meaning: n.粘稠物,浓液,涂料,涂布油,麻醉药物,笨蛋vt.上涂料,预测出vi.服麻醉品n.<美口>内幕,消息
examples: I'm more comfortable with them. I don't feel I'm such a dope.
As a poet wrote, "Man is a victim of dope; In the incurable form of hope."
I carried the "dope sheets" in my mind.
Since spermaceti is hard to come by now, Lawson--the race's official "dope man"--uses paraffin.
Reid, a former boxer, was hunched and mumbling, playing rope-a-dope, vowing to fend off amendments all night.
